text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the event race at<n>Tracen Academy
that Carrot Ranger is<n>attending.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm going to get first place and<n>perform
with Carrot Ranger!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're gonna be in the race?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yep! Not only that, I'm gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
What? Someone as tiny as you can't<n>possibly
win against big and strong<n>runners!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, there's no way!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a second! It's rude to call an<n>ally of
justice tiny!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
The size of a person doesn't matter!<n>What
matters is the strength of their<n>heart!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
But if you're small, you're weak, and<n>weaklings
never win! That's what the<n>big kids always—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Look, I don't know what you'vebeen told, but what's important iswhat you want to be!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Carrot Ranger always says,<n>"Anything's
possible as long as you<n>believe!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
My name is Biko Pegasus! And in<n>today's race,
I'm gonna prove to you<n>that anything's possible!

text_block_list.name: Boys
text_block_list.text: Biko... Pegasus...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ugh! I can't breakthrough to the front!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(As much as I hate to admit it, they<n>were right.
My size puts me at a<n>disadvantage...)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(But I've trained so hard to get where<n>I am! I
can't afford to lose now!)

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: R-ruuuuun!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: Don't give up, Biko Pegasus!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You two?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(I almost forgot... I'm not just running<n>for
myself!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(I'm running for those who trained<n>together with
me, for those who<n>support me, and for everyone
placing<n>their hopes in me!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(Watch over me, Carrot Ranger! With<n>the strength
of everyone's courage,<n>I'll...)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Graaaah! PEGASUS STRIIIIIKE!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The race finishes... with Biko Pegasus<n>dashing
into first at the last second!

text_block_list.name: Boys
text_block_list.text: U-um!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you two! Thanks for cheering<n>me on!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about this morning. The big kids<n>always
make fun of us 'cause we're<n>small...

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
But seeing you run today gave us<n>courage! We
know now what's<n>important is the strength of
our hearts!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text: Yes! That is the way!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: C-Carrot Ranger?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe you'vebeen watching me since this morning...

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
You have nothing to be ashamed of!<n>The way
you encouraged those<n>youngsters is admirable!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess so! Um... I just want to<n>say you're
my hero!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I want to become a hero and give<n>people
courage, just like you did in<n>episode 112!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that warms my heart! You're<n>doing great
work, new hero!
